mapper.select: SELECT l.lecture_id AS lectureId, l.type AS lectureType, mj.name AS majorName, l.name AS lectureName, m.name AS proName, l.credit, ls.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, ls.end_period AS endPeriod, ls.start_period AS startPeriod, lr.building, lr.room_number AS roomNumber, l.academic_year AS academicYear, l.max_std AS maxStd, (l.max_std - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course WHERE lecture_id = l.lecture_id)) AS rem_std, l.status FROM lecture l LEFT JOIN member m ON l.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN major mj ON l.major_id = mj.major_id LEFT JOIN lecture_schedule ls ON l.lecture_id = ls.lecture_id LEFT JOIN lecture_room lr ON ls.room_id = lr.room_id WHERE l.year = YEAR(CURDATE()) ORDER BY l.name
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(l.credit), 0) FROM course c JOIN lecture l ON c.lecture_id = l.lecture_id WHERE c.member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT l.lecture_id AS lectureId, l.type AS lectureType, mj.name AS majorName, l.name AS lectureName, m.name AS proName, l.credit, ls.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, ls.end_period AS endPeriod, ls.start_period AS startPeriod, lr.building, lr.room_number AS roomNumber, l.academic_year AS academicYear, l.max_std AS maxStd, (l.max_std - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course WHERE lecture_id = l.lecture_id)) AS rem_std, l.status, (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM attendance WHERE course_id = c.course_id) AS isAttended FROM course c JOIN lecture l ON c.lecture_id = l.lecture_id LEFT JOIN member m ON l.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN major mj ON l.major_id = mj.major_id LEFT JOIN lecture_schedule ls ON l.lecture_id = ls.lecture_id LEFT JOIN lecture_room lr ON ls.room_id = lr.room_id WHERE c.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY l.name
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM course WHERE lecture_id = #{lectureId} AND member_id = #{memberId};
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course SET lecture_id = #{lectureId}, member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT lecture_id AS lectureId, major_id AS majorId, type AS lectureType, academic_year AS academicYear, max_std AS maxStd, (max_std - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course WHERE lecture_id = #{lectureId})) AS remStd FROM lecture WHERE lecture_id = #{lectureId}
SELECT member_id AS memberId, major_id AS majorId, academic_year AS academicYear FROM student WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
